title: Enforcement notifications - Canada.ca
content:
## Enforcement notifications
This section contains information about successful prosecutions across Canada. To view Environment and Climate Change Canada news releases please visit the news room . For further information please contact Environment and Climate Change Canada Media Relations at: 819-938-3338. Subscribe to enforcement notifications

## Latest notifications
- 2026-06-10 - British Columbia resident fined $6,000 for federal and provincial wildlife offences involving turtles
- 2026-05-15 - ArcelorMittal Exploitation Minière Canada s.e.n.c. fined $100 million for violating the Fisheries Act through illegal deposits of deleterious substances
- 2026-05-08 - Transport Desgagnés Inc. fined $40,000 for Canada Wildlife Act violations in Nunavut
- 2026-05-07 - Six Quebec hunters fined a total of $14,000 for illegally hunting migratory birds
- 2026-02-26 - Canada prevents illegal export of over one million kilograms of waste
- 2026-02-02 - Estee Lauder Cosmetics Ltd. fined $750,000 for violating the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999
- 2026-01-08 - Superior General Partner Inc. and one individual fined a total of $1,365,000 for violating the Fisheries Act
